creator: ganael.laplanche@martymac.com
text:
Hello,

This is a proposal to update our 'old' Xine's libdvdnav with MPlayer's version. Libdvdread has already been updated (see ports/127849).

The patch (uuencoded + gzipped) updates the following ports :

- multimedia/libdvdnav : update from v0.1.10 to v4.1.3
- multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-dvd : bump PORTREVISION
- multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-ugly : add a patch to fix dvdnav detection
- multimedia/lxdvdrip : bump PORTREVISION
- multimedia/mplayerxp : bump PORTREVISION
- multimedia/vlc : bump PORTREVISION
- multimedia/totem : bump PORTREVISION
- multimedia/nmm : bump PORTREVISION and fix dvdnav detection

Please note that those patches have only been tested in a limited environment (8-CURRENT/amd64).

As a result of this update, multimedia/libdvdnav-mplayer should be deleted (it is currently not used by any port as a dependency).

Nobutaka, as you are the current maintainer of the port, I have let your address (of course) in the MAINTAINER variable :) If you would like me to become libdvdnav's maintainer (I would be pleased to), just feel free to replace you address with mine (ganael.laplanche@martymac.com).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
